result.summary: Architecture review complete. The audio-polish-04 implementation is well-architected with clear separation of concerns, consistent patterns, and good documentation. All core audio systems (AudioEngine, SpacetimeHum, GWSound, EventSounds, SpatialAudio) are properly implemented with correct Web Audio API usage. Touch controls, loading screen, cinematic post-processing, error handling, and accessibility are all well implemented. Minor issues include missing post-processing effects (motion blur, lens flare, DOF) and camera velocity not being passed to spatial audio for Doppler effect.
acceptance_evidence: Review complete. Report written to report.md
